---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

Describe the feature or improvement clearly.

## Why?

Explain the problem this solves or the use case it enables.

## Possible approach

If you have a rough idea of how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Platform scope

Select the affected areas.
* [ ] Server (Linux)
* [ ] Server (Windows)
* [ ] Client (macOS)
* [ ] Protocol (`streamd-proto`)
